textByHashes.fb7124af1cd4d6909c5a7cd438d53663363ee941: Hi . You woke me up, I was fast asleep!
textByHashes.a7fbec8912492bbeb66aaf30d7d14a9062d38aa6: Hello then. Can I help you with anything?
textByHashes.d321eb28cd916ce3080d4a4df12081b8b83621b9: It does during meal times, but it's also lovely and warm near the fire, and look at all the food!
textByHashes.e892c5a6319353c0c8f36098c8c301539ae4e307: You catch on quickly, for a human! Now I am going to go back to sleep, unless there is something else I can help you with?
textByHashes.690d980543dfc5994d2e31b424879873fe26d586: Oh, hello . Did I hear a bark?
textByHashes.c960a11b590766e725511f3c80a49248f3ee907e: It always wakes me up with its barking.
textByHashes.ddc388a7012502ed4f5ff37846274605745e14e1: It seems to come and go. I can't figure out why or how.
textByHashes.9d35ac5d1bba132b911482c2d9d48c325776bfd7: There it is again, did you hear it?
textByHashes.912f95016b68639c3d7beadf124dca22e670ad38: I'm okay, thank you. I've been enjoying the piano playing. Was it you playing earlier?
textByHashes.25e69bd1db2aa91eea30336365b3da887d056e41: Must have been Gem then. She often plays the piano when she thinks nobody is listening.
textByHashes.1dbecc8552914e2011961db3a7b0af0feb77d5c9: I do sometimes. If I do go out, it's normally at night.
textByHashes.163004016a7a9c1ddfeac111ee53a0a614c1ff1b: I much prefer it in here though. Nice and warm with good food. There is even a bank, if I ever needed a bank for anything.
textByHashes.de0a84ed337ddf5d1e288555c21941105fb4b0ec: Exactly. It's much nicer to relax here, even with the occasional adventurer disturbing me.
textByHashes.595da1825f55156adefdcb48f359ef4e097ba519: Thank you . That's very tasty, though it would be even more tasty if it was cooked.
textByHashes.9f8d07202c014ece3825360fd90abd49224bd052: I do. Why do you think I'm in the kitchen? All this lovely food being cooked all the time!
textByHashes.547bf01a245de97dc011eed0fca95f1ad5b5a254: I look forward to it. You know where to find me.
textByHashes.1c4435e3a02eba1f332ba2e462988f9718f3113b: Thank you . That was lovely! Do you have any more?
textByHashes.b808510063a2b22096d09848197593e98957815b: Lovely, I'll be right here, working hard.
